channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Clutter in Blandford court 1st floor walkway and stairs, 23rd May
item.description:
People gathering, spreading clutter, gathering, leaving food and liquids, personal items as if living there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Peters Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bag dumped outside The Last Drop Inn., 23rd May
item.description:
Rubbish dumped on pavement outside The Last Drop Inn

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham High Street, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp post 2516 missing warning signage for hazardous intersection which is unworkable inadequate signage and flawed traffic control resulting in wild and uncontrolled disorganized and dangerous traffic movements across this junction. Greenwich Council required to instigate a full review of the site and propose improvements., 23rd May
item.description:
Lamp post 2516 missing warning signage for hazardous intersection which is unworkable inadequate signage and flawed traffic control resulting in wild and uncontrolled disorganized and dangerous traffic movements across this junction. Greenwich Council required to instigate a full review of the site and propose improvements.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unworkable road layout and traffic control due to poor road markings, poor signage and flawed traffic control resulting in wild and uncontrolled disorganized and messy traffic movements across this junction. Greenwich Council required to instigate a full review of the site and propose improvements., 23rd May
item.description:
Unworkable road layout and traffic control due to poor road markings, poor signage and flawed traffic control resulting in wild and uncontrolled disorganized and messy traffic movements across this junction. Greenwich Council required to instigate a full review of the site and propose improvements.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unworkable road layout and traffic control due to poor road markings, poor signage and flawed traffic control resulting in wild and uncontrolled disorganized and messy traffic movements across this junction. Greenwich Council required to instigate a full review of the site and propose improvements., 23rd May
item.description:

item.title: Litter in curbside down here needs removing please, 23rd May
item.description:
.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, College View, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light blocked by street tree, 23rd May
item.description:
This street light capacity to illuminated the road and the pavement is severely blocked the street tree in the grass verge which is only 1.5metres away from the light. Can someone please prune the tree, also this tree requires cutting back as the lower branches are very low(below head hight) for users of the pavements.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westgate Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At the corner of Rollin street and Ilderton Road, 23rd May
item.description:
Sticker

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ilderton Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Resident Painted Footpath, 23rd May
item.description:
The resident at the end of Fenham and Kincaid has painted the footpath. It’s an absolute mess and he’s ruined the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 117, Fenham Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 48 laurier road, 23rd May
item.description:
Sink hole middle of road deep
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Laurier Road, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various clothing dumped here, 23rd May
item.description:
Outside dominos in the corner, Can council attend and remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 161, Masons Hill, Widmore, Greater London

item.title: Flyposting, 23rd May
item.description:
By both entrances of the subway between Tesco and Greenland dock

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redriff Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London

item.title: Mattress left on street, 23rd May
item.description:
Mattress and other rubbish left on street on corner of rock mount road and plumstead high street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead High Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard between Priestley House and sport centre, 23rd May
item.description:
The centre lockable/removable bollard has been missing since last year and has not been replaced so far, despite reports made at the end of last year.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wilkin Street, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 gas cannisters beside the public bin, 23rd May
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensbourne Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Advertising van on junction of Rochester Way/Granby Road., 23rd May
item.description:
Van is not taxed, is covered in adverts, and has been in location for approx 6 months. Reported to police who confirmed it has false number plates but they could not deal with matter and it should be reported to Fix My Street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin set alight, 23rd May
item.description:
Outside 103 Crofton Lane at the bus stop the bin has been set alight and is now across pavement area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 103, Crofton Lane, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 23rd May
item.description:
Clothing dumped on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beck Way, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Lawnmower left on Marcia Road, 23rd May
item.description:
Someone has dumped a Lawnmower on the street opposite 29/31 Marcia Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
